title: Class 710 (London Overground)
body:
Created by Skywalker_6517

- Textures by Jonathan Ho and Navi
- Sounds by Navi, Szandor13 and Ceruliian
- Wheel positions and bogie by Extreme Maker X 
- Additional help from Georgecat19

Coaches added:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Class 710 Cab Forwards
- Class 710 Pantograph (Down) Forwards 
- Class 710 Pantograph (5 Blocks) Forwards
- Class 710 Pantograph (6 Blocks) Forwards
- Class 710 Trailer
- Class 710 Pantograph (Down) Backwards
- Class 710 Pantograph (5 Blocks) Backwards
- Class 710 Pantograph (6 Blocks) Backwards
- Class 710 Cab Backwards
</details>

**Why choose us?**
- We stand for community creations
- The train has a great number of details, pantographs, cabs, modelled seats, modelled bogies, cab lights, door buttons, accurate sounds!
- It is accurate and playable for Minecraft
- A full blockbench model reduces lag



This is a resource pack for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod and it adds the class 710 to the mod for **MTR 4** users. This pack marks the 1st anniversary of skywalker_6517 posting content on Modrinth and is a succession to the Aventra family line he creates. You can find the original project here: [Class 345 Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/class-345)
